I can't stop checking my email; something is going to go wrong.
The deadline is tomorrow and my hands are shaking.
I keep replaying the meeting and finding new things I said wrong.
I haven't heard back and my chest is tight; I think they're upset.
I keep refreshing the chat and nothing comes through.
I'm spiralling about what they meant by that message.
The noise of the street is unbearable today; every horn is going through me.
I had to leave the cafe; it was too loud and I couldn't breathe.
I'm walking too fast and I don't know where I'm going.
I can't eat; my stomach is in knots.
I'm pacing the kitchen and forgetting why I came in.
The smell of the food is making me nauseous tonight.
I'm wide awake at three in the morning catastrophizing.
Every time I close my eyes my mind races again.
I keep checking the clock and the night will not end.
I went for a run because I couldn't sit still and I'm still wired.
My heart is racing even though I'm just standing here.
I tried to do yoga and my mind wouldn't stop.
I'm going to miss the connection and I can feel my chest tightening.
The traffic is making me panic; I keep checking the GPS.
I missed the train and I can feel myself unraveling.
I've been reading the news for an hour and I feel sick.
I can't stop refreshing the page; every update makes it worse.
The headline got to me and I haven't been able to put my phone down.
The apartment is a mess and I'm crying about the dishes.
I can't decide what to do first and I'm just standing in the middle of the room.
Every small task feels enormous and I'm on the edge of tears.
